chat.emptyState: Ask a question and I'll answer from your notes, with links to the sources.
chat.noConnections: No AI connection configured. Add one in Settings → AI.
chat.noResults: I couldn't find that in your notes.
chat.title: Chat with your vault

entities.empty: No entities yet. Extract them from this note.
entities.notConfigured: Configure an AI connection in Settings → AI to extract entities.
entities.title: Entities

rewrite.label: AI rewrite
rewrite.staleSelection: The text changed while the rewrite was being generated. Make a new selection and try again.

agentic.hint: Let this CLI read and edit your vault's files to carry out open-ended tasks. Each run is committed to git first, so you can revert it. Use with care.
agentic.label: Agentic vault access

ambient.desc: After you pause editing a note, quietly propose links to related notes and useful tags. Runs through the selected AI connection, so it spends tokens in the background — off by default.
ambient.hint: Runs in the background once an edit settles, only when an AI connection is configured.
ambient.label: Suggest links and tags as you write
ambient.title: Ambient suggestions

settings.binaryPathPlaceholder: Optional: full path to the binary
settings.cliHint: Uses your local CLI login — no API key needed.
settings.desc: Add API keys for Claude, OpenAI, and OpenAI-compatible services (DeepSeek, …), or use a locally-installed Claude Code / Codex CLI. Keys are stored in your operating system's keychain.

embed.desc: Build an on-device index of note embeddings to surface related notes. Embeddings are computed once — on-device or through an OpenAI-compatible connection — and lookups then stay local.
embed.localHint: Runs entirely on your device (bge-small-en-v1.5). The first build downloads a ~130 MB model, then works offline.
embed.noConnections: Choose the bundled local model below, or add an OpenAI-compatible connection above for cloud embeddings.
embed.notConfigured: Pick a connection and model to enable.
embed.title: Semantic search

settings.empty: No connections yet. Add one below.
settings.label: Name

templates.bodyPlaceholder: The prompt — e.g. Translate the note into German.
templates.desc: Reusable prompts shown in the editor's AI menu, saved as editable .md files. Vault templates sync across your devices; device templates stay on this machine (available in every vault).
templates.title: Prompt templates

settings.title: AI connections

voice.tooltip: Record a meeting and extract tasks (on-device)
voice.noSpeech: No speech was detected in the recording.
voice.unavailable: Voice capture isn't available on this platform.
